'''Glynis Oliver''' is a comic-book [[Wikipedia:colorist|colorist]] who worked on many comics in [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel's ''Star Wars'']] series. She went by the name '''Glynis Wein''' while she was married to [[Marvel Comics]] writer [[Len Wein]].

{{Artist-stub}}
